Profile

About Amanda

Hands-on HR leader with 20+ years of recruiting and people strategy experience across EMEA & APAC in tech and consumer sectors.

A trusted business advisor to senior leaders with a reputation for supporting HR transformation, leading cross-cultural collaboration, and driving pragmatic, progressive problem-solving.

Deep experience in talent acquisition, employee engagement, employer branding and DEI. Proven track record translating business goals into data-led people strategies and hiring top talent across corporate, engineering, frontline and graduate segments.

Has delivered measurable change, cost efficiency and business impact across Fortune 1000 MNCs — trained initially onsite at Microsoft — and most recently at a Private Equity-backed firm in Southeast Asia.

Actively seeking new opportunities in 2026, based in Singapore (PR).

Work Experience

PG
PropertyGuru Group
Director, People & Culture (NYSE: PGRU, now private)
Jan 2023 – Present · Promoted Jan 2024
▼
Private equity-backed $1bn online technology marketplace serving real estate markets in SE Asia
  • Part of Group HR Leadership Team connecting Talent-to-Value, building HR tools, policies and processes for business efficiency
  • Consolidated fragmented local HR teams into a cohesive COE model, achieving 31,000+ days of productivity in 2024 through process redesigns and automation (+65% faster approvals, +55% hiring speed)
  • Partnered with C-suite on workforce forecasting, org design and succession across SE Asia & India
  • Head of DEI: responsible for staff engagement, actionable strategy and ER adjudication
  • Supported PE-backed restructuring including leadership coaching, HR change communications and manager capability training
  • Developed end-to-end Early Careers programme (Prodi-G) including talent planning, learning roadmap and business impact metrics
  • Implemented Workday HRIS and integrated PowerBI dashboards for automated, data-led workforce metrics
  • Developed award-winning employer brand; achieved Top Employers certification
  • Built market-specific HR interventions for India, Vietnam and Singapore
